signin.title: Sign In to Continue
signin.body: Track visa readiness for your whole family in one place.
create.title: Set up your household
create.body: Give your family a name to start inviting adult relatives and adding dependents you manage directly.
create.error_name: Please name your household (e.g. "The Adeyemi Family").
adult.title: Adult family members
adult.body: Invite a spouse or adult child to share visa readiness with {{name}}. They control exactly which checklist (if any) to link, and can disconnect at any time — you'll never see their financial answers, risk score breakdown, or documents.
dep.title: Dependents you manage directly
dep.body: For a child or anyone with no VisaClear account of their own. No invite needed — you create and own their record and any checklists you save on their behalf.
employer_conflict.title: You're linked to an employer organisation
employer_conflict.body: Your account is already an admin of an employer organisation. Multi-membership isn't supported yet, so a separate household can't be created from this account.
